task_name: Define Local HTTP Mock Route Contract
goal: Define the local HTTP mock route contract for the Builder Adapter before any server implementation is added.
claims: BP-012 defines server shape, auth posture, request parsing, response behavior, and no-network guarantees for a future local HTTP mock route.
BP-012 does not implement an HTTP server or route.
The contract requires reuse of BP-011 endpoint handler behavior and fixtures.
assumptions: A document-only HTTP mock route contract is required before server code.
The first HTTP route should use Node built-ins or existing project dependencies only.
No package, tool, example, or runtime edit is required for BP-012.
dod: The document defines route shape, local-only binding, auth posture, request parsing limits, response mapping, no-network guarantee, and test requirements.
The document explicitly keeps live Builder, external network, deploy, merge, persistence, and UI out of scope.
stop_conditions: Live Builder endpoint or network behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-011 completed a local mock endpoint handler and warned that any live HTTP route needs a fresh contract for server shape, auth posture, and no-network guarantees.
